## Runtime.RuntimeContextValidator.findIngredients() method

Finds ingredients matching a JSON query specification.

This unified method accepts plain JSON objects and converts them to typed query specifications. Use this when working with user input or configuration.

**Signature:**

```typescript
findIngredients(json: unknown, options?: IFindOptions): Result<ReadonlyArray<AnyRuntimeIngredient>>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

json


</td><td>

unknown


</td><td>

JSON object with indexer ID strings as keys and config objects as values


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[IFindOptions](./ts-chocolate.runtime.indexers.ifindoptions.md)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional find options (aggregation mode)


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;ReadonlyArray&lt;[AnyRuntimeIngredient](./ts-chocolate.runtime.anyruntimeingredient.md)<!-- -->&gt;&gt;

Array of matching RuntimeIngredient objects

## Example


```typescript
// Find ingredients by tag
ctx.validating.findIngredients({
  'ingredients-by-tag': { tag: 'chocolate' }
});
```
